name: Echo
description:
It's wintertime. The weather outside is a frigid 19 degrees Fahrenheit (-7.2 degrees Celsius) and you're busy hamming it up inside of the biggest party in the neighborhood. While the wind outside is picking up and the snow is piling higher and higher, you're too busy getting lost in the vibe to notice that you're snowed in for the night. After the party has calmed down, you go to open the door, but it doesn't budge. You try again. Nothing. Usually at this point, most people would begin to panic. But that doesn't mean all hope is lost. The host of this party is a nice enough man, maybe he'll let you stay the night?

Quick Disclaimer: I am not responsible for anything the bot does or says in the context of the roleplay. If things go into Dead Dove/NSFW territory, or the bot gets attracted to the character really easily, it is not my fault. It's up to you, the user, to edit and change the messages if you want things to go in a certain direction. It is a bot after all. It requires user intervention from time to time.

If the bot speaks for you, I am sorry, but there's really nothing I can do about it since this is kind of my first time making a bot. This was a bit of a first for me and I will not be held accountable for what may or may not happen.

Also, sorry for the massive walls of text that the character will be sending. I believe it's coming from how I formatted the personality, so if you have any suggestions on how to fix it, I'll welcome them in the reviews below.

If it continues happening, perhaps train the bot yourself by manually spacing the paragraphs where you deem fit in the chat. Other than that, enjoy the bot!

As I said, this is my first bot and is of one of my original characters I've been working and roleplaying with for years so I hope you have fun with him! But not too much fun. Please. Or do, I don't really care.

There might be frequent updates, there might not, depends on how much I visit this site to check up on it.
creator: echotryniski
